---
title: "comaprison"
author: "Yelon"
date: "2026-04-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(CellChat)
# install.packages("devtools")
# devtools::install_github("immunogenomics/presto")
# devtools::install_github("jinworks/CellChat")

library(exFINDER)
## devtools::install_github("xyang2uchicago/BioTIP"), as dependencies
# library("devtools")
#library(org.Mm.eg.db)
# BiocManager::install("org.Mm.eg.db"), as dependencies
# BiocManager::install("org.Dr.eg.db")
## devtools::install_github("ChanghanGitHub/exFINDER")
# devtools::install_local("exFinder_data/exFINDER.zip") 

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(dplyr)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggraph)

set.seed(805181) ## for repeatability of cluster mapping.
```

## 0- load seurat split object and ltGRN

```{r}
## RUN first "Figure_S6A_3" to generate "R11_3_split_obj_for_Exfinder.Rdata"
load("R11_3_split_obj_for_Exfinder.Rdata")
###> Fib_obj,FsEpi_obj,PmtHEE_obj

## RUN first "Figure_S6A_1" to generate "R12_7_KC_target_genes_ltGRN.Rdata"
load("R12_7_KC_target_genes_ltGRN.Rdata")
###> target.gene,ltGRN
###> 
###> 
# load exFINDER database
load("exFinder_data/LR_layer1_human.rda")
load("exFinder_data/RTF_layer2_human.rda")
load("exFinder_data/TFT_layer3_human.rda")

exFINDER.H <- list()
exFINDER.H[[1]] <- LR_layer1_human
exFINDER.H[[2]] <- RTF_layer2_human
exFINDER.H[[3]] <- TFT_layer3_human
```

## 1- FsEpi vs. PmtHEE

-   exSigNet: all ltGRNs from env and non-target cells

-   exSigNet.2: cell-specific ltGENs

-   exSigNet.4: env-specific ltGRNs

### 1.1 Prepare data.frame for FsEpi and PmtHEE

```{r}
##> FsEpi
##> 
## Load dataset from FsEpi
load("R12_exFINDER_FsEpi.Rdata")
  #> exSigNet,exSigNet.2,exSigNet.3,exSigNet.4
  #> only exSigNet, exSigNet.2, and exSigNet.4 useful

# prepare the data farame for MEL-ltGRNs
exSigNet.2$Graph.Node-> FsEpi_MEL_genes
exSigNet.2$Graph.Edge-> FsEpi_MEL_ltGRNs

# prepare the data frame for Env-ltGRNs
exSigNet.4$Graph.Node-> FsEpi_env_genes
exSigNet.4$Graph.Edge-> FsEpi_env_ltGRNs
```

```{r}
##> PmtHEE
##> 
## Load dataset from FsEpi
load("R14_exFINDER_PmtHEE.Rdata")
  #> exSigNet.4

# prepare the data farame for Env-ltGRNs
exSigNet.4$Graph.Node-> PmtHEE_env_genes
exSigNet.4$Graph.Edge-> PmtHEE_env_ltGRNs
```

### 1.2 Comparison for MEL-\> KC

```{r}
## Ligand comparison
FsEpi_MEL_ligand <- subset(FsEpi_MEL_genes, Role == "Ligand")
PmtHEE_env_ligand <- subset(PmtHEE_env_genes, Role == "Ligand")
intersect(FsEpi_MEL_ligand$Gene,PmtHEE_env_ligand$Gene)-> MEL_genes
    #>> L1CAM as shared between FsEpi and PmtHEE
```

#### [Visualize shared MEL-\> KC in FsEpi]

-   prepare the dataset

```{r}
## prepare the dataser for FsEpi
selected_obj <- FsEpi_obj

# define the factor
selected_obj$Type <- as.factor(selected_obj$Cell_states) # add "Type", very improtant for later analysis

##> [KC-only] dataset
cell_id <- subset(selected_obj@meta.data, 
                  !Cell_states %in% c("MEL")) # 15103 cells
kc_only_cells <- subset(selected_obj, cells=row.names(cell_id))

exp.data2 <- kc_only_cells@assays$RNA@data
meta.data2 <- kc_only_cells@meta.data ## need column ""Type" for cell labels

#> [All cells] the complete dataset contains all cells, which used for "external signals" from unknown cells or environment.
exp.Exdata <- selected_obj@assays$RNA@data
meta.Exdata <- selected_obj@meta.data
```

```{r}
# Select L1CAM-related TF and ltGRNs 
exSigNet.2$Graph.Edge -> modi_L1CAM_EsEpi_edges
    # modi_L1CAM_EsEpi_genes<- exSigNet.TF_FsEpi$Graph.Edge

###> Output for modi, keep only L1CAM-realted TF, use it for next analysis.
library(openxlsx)
write.xlsx(modi_L1CAM_EsEpi_edges,rowNames=F,
           "R15_edges.xlsx") 

# selected L1CAM-related TFs "CLDN1","EGR1","MYC","JUN","PCBP2","PHGDH","SF1","SFPQ","SNRNP70","SQSTM1","GTF3A" [11 selected TFs from L1CAM-realted TF]
exSigNet.TF_FsEpi <- get_subNet(Graph = exSigNet.2, # FsEpi_MEL
           TF = c("CLDN1","EGR1","MYC","JUN","PCBP2",
                  "PHGDH","SF1","SFPQ","SNRNP70","SQSTM1",
                  "GTF3A")) 

##> Remove any other ligands, besides L1CAM

    # For L1CAM-related edges, output the TF table
exSigNet.TF_FsEpi$Graph.Edge -> modi_L1CAM_EsEpi_edges
library(openxlsx) # outpuf for modi
write.xlsx(modi_L1CAM_EsEpi_edges,rowNames=F,
           "R15_edges.xlsx")
library(readxl)     # input modified table
edges_TF <- read_excel("R15_edges.xlsx")

    # For L1CAM-related genes, output the TF table
exSigNet.TF_FsEpi$Graph.Node -> modi_L1CAM_EsEpi_genes
library(openxlsx) # outpuf for modi
write.xlsx(modi_L1CAM_EsEpi_genes,rowNames=F,
           "R15_genes.xlsx")
library(readxl)   # input modified table
genes_TF <- read_excel("R15_genes.xlsx")

##> Replace the old edges by new_edges
exSigNet.TF_FsEpi$Graph.Edge<- edges_TF
exSigNet.TF_FsEpi$Graph.Node<- genes_TF
```

-   save modified exSigNet

```{r}
## save 
save(exSigNet.TF_FsEpi, file = "R15_1.2_L1CAM-TF_MEL_FsEpi.Rdata")
```

-   heatmap

```{r}
# prepare the dataframe for heatmap plot [env ligand-target network]
#> if error, use "get_AveExp(Gene = unique(exSigNet$Graph.Node$Gene),"
Graph <- exSigNet.TF_FsEpi

exS.2_exp <- get_AveExp(Gene = Graph$Graph.Node$Gene,
           Exp.Data = exp.Exdata, # all cells
           Meta.Data = meta.Exdata)  # all cells

exS.2_exp.HP <- exS.2_exp
exS.2_exp.HP <- exS.2_exp.HP[, -1]
row.names(exS.2_exp.HP) <- exS.2_exp$Gene

# make data.frame includes all cell states
exS.2_exp.HP <- data.frame("BAS" = exS.2_exp.HP$BAS,
                     "SPN" = exS.2_exp.HP$SPN, 
                     'GRN' = exS.2_exp.HP$GRN,
                     "MEL" = exS.2_exp.HP$MEL)

row.names(exS.2_exp.HP) <- exS.2_exp$Gene

# [annotation col] customize the row labels and col labels
annotation_col = data.frame(
  CellType = c("KC", "KC", "KC", "MEL"))
rownames(annotation_col) = colnames(exS.2_exp.HP)


annotation_row <- data.frame(Role = Graph$Graph.Node$Role)
row.names(annotation_row) <- row.names(exS.2_exp.HP)
```

```{r}
# heatmap plot
bk <- c(seq(0,1.99,by=0.01), seq(2,4.5,by=0.01))

p <- pheatmap(exS.2_exp.HP, # modify the gene list can modify the heatmap.
         cluster_row = FALSE, 
         cluster_cols = FALSE, 
         cellwidth = 12, 
         cellheight = 12,
         # gaps_row = c(1, 2, 6),
         fontsize_row = 10,
         fontsize_col = 10,
         annotation_row = annotation_row,
         annotation_col = annotation_col,
         color = colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(n = 7, name ="RdYlBu")))(length(bk)),
         breaks=bk)

ggsave(p,filename = "R15_1.2_heatmap_L1CAM-TF_exSigNet_FsEpi.pdf",
       width = 10, height =20)
```

#### [Visualize shared MEL-\> KC in PmtHEE]

-   prepare the dataset

```{r}
selected_obj <- PmtHEE_obj

####> PmtHEE KC
selected_obj$Type <- as.factor(selected_obj$Cell_states) # add "Type", very improtant for later analysis

cell_id <- subset(selected_obj@meta.data, 
                  !Cell_states %in% c("MEL")) # 1796 cells
kc_only_cells <- subset(selected_obj, cells=row.names(cell_id))

exp.data2 <- kc_only_cells@assays$RNA@data
meta.data2 <- kc_only_cells@meta.data ## need column ""Type" for cell labels

meta.data2$Type <- droplevels(meta.data2$Type) # if still MEL error

###> PmtHEE [All cells]
exp.Exdata <- selected_obj@assays$RNA@data
meta.Exdata <- selected_obj@meta.data
```

-   Prepare the plot data

```{r}
exSigNet.4 # Env-specific Ligands

# Select L1CAM-related TF and ltGRNs 
exSigNet.4$Graph.Edge -> modi_L1CAM_PmtHEE_edges

###> Output for modi, keep only L1CAM-realted TF, use it for next analysis.
library(openxlsx)
write.xlsx(modi_L1CAM_PmtHEE_edges,rowNames=F,
           "R15_edges.xlsx") 

# selected L1CAM-related TFs "JUN","NOTCH2","PCBP2","PHGDH","SFPQ","H2AZ1" [6 selected TFs from L1CAM-realted TF]
exSigNet.TF_PmtHEE <- get_subNet(Graph = exSigNet.4, # FsEpi_MEL
           TF = c("JUN","NOTCH2","PCBP2","PHGDH","SFPQ","H2AZ1"))

##> Remove any other ligands, besides L1CAM

    # For L1CAM-related edges, output the TF table
exSigNet.TF_PmtHEE$Graph.Edge -> modi_L1CAM_PmtHEE_edges
library(openxlsx) # outpuf for modi
write.xlsx(modi_L1CAM_PmtHEE_edges,rowNames=F,
           "R15_edges.xlsx")
library(readxl)   # input modified table
edges_TF <- read_excel("R15_edges.xlsx")

    # For L1CAM-related genes, output the TF table
exSigNet.TF_PmtHEE$Graph.Node -> modi_L1CAM_PmtHEE_genes
library(openxlsx) # outpuf for modi
write.xlsx(modi_L1CAM_PmtHEE_genes,rowNames=F,
           "R15_genes.xlsx")
library(readxl)   # input modified table
genes_TF <- read_excel("R15_genes.xlsx")

##> Replace the old edges by new_edges
exSigNet.TF_PmtHEE$Graph.Edge<- edges_TF
exSigNet.TF_PmtHEE$Graph.Node<- genes_TF
```

-   save modified exSigNet

```{r}
## save 
save(exSigNet.TF_PmtHEE, file = "R15_1.2_L1CAM-TF_MEL_PmtHEE.Rdata")
```

-   heatmap

```{r}
# prepare the dataframe for heatmap plot [env ligand-target network]
#> if error, use "get_AveExp(Gene = unique(exSigNet$Graph.Node$Gene),"
Graph <- exSigNet.TF_PmtHEE

exS.2_exp <- get_AveExp(Gene = Graph$Graph.Node$Gene,
           Exp.Data = exp.data2, # all cells
           Meta.Data = meta.data2)  # all cells

exS.2_exp.HP <- exS.2_exp
exS.2_exp.HP <- exS.2_exp.HP[, -1]
row.names(exS.2_exp.HP) <- exS.2_exp$Gene

# make data.frame includes all cell states
exS.2_exp.HP <- data.frame("BAS" = exS.2_exp.HP$BAS,
                     "SPN" = exS.2_exp.HP$SPN, 
                     'GRN' = exS.2_exp.HP$GRN)

row.names(exS.2_exp.HP) <- exS.2_exp$Gene

# [annotation col] customize the row labels and col labels
annotation_col = data.frame(
  CellType = c("KC", "KC", "KC"))
rownames(annotation_col) = colnames(exS.2_exp.HP)


annotation_row <- data.frame(Role = Graph$Graph.Node$Role)
row.names(annotation_row) <- row.names(exS.2_exp.HP)
```

```{r}
# heatmap plot
bk <- c(seq(0,1.99,by=0.01), seq(2,4.5,by=0.01))

role_colors <- c(
  "Ligand" = "#FF89FF", 
  "Receptor" = "#FF9288",  
  "TF" = "#01D65C",  
  "Target" = "#82B7FF"   # pink
)

annotation_colors <- list(Role = role_colors,
                          CellType = c("KC" = "#BEC100"))

bk <- c(seq(0,1.99,by=0.01), seq(2,4.5,by=0.01))

p <- pheatmap(exS.2_exp.HP, # modify the gene list can modify the heatmap.
         cluster_row = FALSE, 
         cluster_cols = FALSE, 
         cellwidth = 12, 
         cellheight = 12,
         # gaps_row = c(1, 2, 6),
         fontsize_row = 10,
         fontsize_col = 10,
         annotation_row = annotation_row,
         annotation_col = annotation_col,
         annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
         color = colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(n = 7, name ="RdYlBu")))(length(bk)),
         breaks=bk)

ggsave(p,filename = "R15_1.2_heatmap_L1CAM-TF_exSigNet_PmtHEE.pdf",
       width = 10, height =20)
```

## 2- Common ltGRN of MEL-\> KC

### [Figure_6C] 2.1 Common elements in Heatmap

-   BASED ON the previously generated figures. and combined, modified by Adobe Ilustrator.

![](images/Screenshot%202025-04-16%20at%2012.17.47%E2%80%AFAM.png){width="288"}

### 2.2 Common L1CAM/EZR-related ltGRN

```{r}
# prepare the data farame for Env-ltGRNs
exSigNet.TF_FsEpi$Graph.Node-> FsEpi_MEL_genes
exSigNet.TF_PmtHEE$Graph.Node-> PmtHEE_MEL_genes

FsEpi_MEL_TF <- subset(FsEpi_MEL_genes, Role == "TF")
PmtHEE_MEL_TF <- subset(PmtHEE_MEL_genes, Role == "TF")
intersect(FsEpi_MEL_TF$Gene,PmtHEE_MEL_TF$Gene)-> Common_TF_genes ## TF
    #>> "JUN"   "PCBP2" "PHGDH" "SFPQ" 
    #>
# common ltGRN
```

```{r}
### Select COMMON TF for ltGRNs
exSigNet.TF_common_ltGRN <- get_subNet(Graph = exSigNet.TF_PmtHEE, # FsEpi_MEL
           TF = Common_TF_genes)

exSigNet.TF_common_ltGRN$Graph.Edge-> final_common_ltGRN

## Save
library(openxlsx) # outpuf for modi
write.xlsx(final_common_ltGRN,rowNames=F,
           "R15_2.2_L1CAM_common_TF_ltGRN_FsEpi_PmtHEE.xlsx")

save(exSigNet.TF_common_ltGRN, file = "R15_2.2_final_LICAN-EZR_ltGRN_FsEpi_PmtHEE.Rdata")
```

## 3- Ligand Venn plot

-   exSigNet.2: cell-specific ltGENs

-   exSigNet.4: env-specific ltGRNs

### 3.1- Data preparation

```{r}
## load exSigNet for each condition
load("R14_exFINDER_PmtHEE.Rdata")
exSigNet.4$Graph.Node-> PmtHEE_env_genes
PmtHEE_env_Ligand <- subset(PmtHEE_env_genes, Role == "Ligand")

load("R13_exFINDER_FibHSE.Rdata")
exSigNet.4$Graph.Node-> FibHSE_env_genes
FibHSE_env_Ligand <- subset(FibHSE_env_genes, Role == "Ligand")

load("R12_exFINDER_FsEpi.Rdata")
exSigNet.2$Graph.Node-> FsEpi_MEL_genes
FsEpi_MEL_Ligand <- subset(FsEpi_MEL_genes, Role == "Ligand")

FsEpi_MEL_Ligand 
```

### [Figure_6B] 3.2- Venn plot

```{r}
library(eulerr)
  # BiocManager::install("eulerr")
set.seed(805181)

new_genelist <- list(FsEpi_MEL = FsEpi_MEL_Ligand$Gene,
                     FibHSE_env= FibHSE_env_Ligand$Gene,
                     PmtHEE_env = PmtHEE_env_Ligand$Gene)
  # save
  new_genelist-> ligand_comparison
  save(ligand_comparison, file = "R15_3.2_data_ligand_venn_plot.Rdata")

p1<-euler(new_genelist, shape = "ellipse")

p2<-plot(p1,
     fills = c(FsEpi_MEL = "#01D65C", 
               FibHSE_env= "#FF7878",
               PmtHEE_env= "#3859FF"),     #"#00CBFF"
     edges = FALSE,
     fontsize = 20,
     quantities = list(fontsize = 13))

ggsave("Fig6B_ligand_venn_plot.pdf",
       plot = p2,
       width = 7, 
       height =5)
```

## [Fig_S6B] 4- GO_BP enrichment analysis

```{r}
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(clusterProfiler)

# using final exSignet for L1CAM
exSigNet.TF_common_ltGRN

# GO analysis and evaluate top 5 GO terms
GO.exSigNet <- get_EnrichAnalysis(Graph = exSigNet.TF_common_ltGRN,
                               OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                               Number.of.Terms = 5,
                               ont = "BP",
                               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                               qvalueCutoff = 0.05)

# enrichment clusterprofile obj
GO.exSigNet$`GO analysis results`-> ego

p1<-barplot(ego,
        x="Count", ## can be changed as "GeneRatio" or "Percentage".
        font.size = 13,
        color = "qvalue", # Can be changed to qvalue or p.adjust
        showCategory=5, title="L1CAM-EZR ltGRN")

## the order is from the most signficant to the least, according to the pvalue.
## only the GO term [ratio>0] could be drawn out.


ggsave("FigS6B_common_L1CAM-EZR_GO_BP_plot.pdf",
       plot = p1,
       width = 7, 
       height =5)
```

## 5- VlnPlot for L1CAM-EZR and TFs

### [Fig_6E]5.1- VlnPlot for FsEpi vs. PmtHEE

```{r}
load("R11_2_kc_fib_mel_in_all_cells.Rdata")
# selected_study_cells

DefaultAssay(selected_study_cells)<- "RNA"

# select only FsEpi and PmtHEE
cell_id <- subset(selected_study_cells@meta.data, 
                  !study %in% c("FibHSE")) # 22475 cells

## extract the cells along the defined ID 
selected_obj <- subset(selected_study_cells, cells=row.names(cell_id))

## reorder
## personalize the x-axis oeder
selected_obj$Cell_states <- factor(x = selected_obj$Cell_states, levels = c("BAS","SPN","GRN","MEL"))

custom_colors = c(FsEpi_MEL = "#01D65C", 
          PmtHEE_env= "#3859FF")

plots <- VlnPlot(object = selected_obj, 
                 features = c("L1CAM", "EZR", 
                              "PCBP2","PHGDH","SFPQ","JUN"), 
                 split.by = "study", 
                 group.by = "Cell_states",
                 pt.size = 0, 
                 stack = T, 
                 flip = T,
                 cols=custom_colors) 

ggsave("Fig6E_common_L1CAM-EZR_vlnplot.pdf",
       plot = plots,
       width = 7, 
       height =5)
```

### [Fig_S7A] 5.2- VlnPlot for FsEpi, PmtHEE, FibHSE

```{r}
load("R11_2_kc_fib_mel_in_all_cells.Rdata")
# selected_study_cells
# Integrated FsEpi + FibHSE + PmtHEE

DefaultAssay(selected_study_cells)<- "RNA"

selected_study_cells-> selected_obj

## personalize the x-axis oeder
selected_obj$Cell_states <- factor(x = selected_obj$Cell_states, levels = c("BAS","SPN","GRN","Fib","MEL"))

selected_obj$study <- factor(x = selected_obj$study, levels = c("FsEpi","PmtHEE","FibHSE"))
## define the color with transparency.

custom_colors = c(FsEpi = "#01D65C",
          PmtHEE= "#3859FF",
          FibHSE = "#FF7878")


plots <- VlnPlot(object = selected_obj, 
                 features = c("L1CAM", "EZR", 
                              "PCBP2","PHGDH","SFPQ","JUN"), 
                 split.by = "study", 
                 group.by = "Cell_states",
                 pt.size = 0, 
                 stack = T, 
                 flip = T,
                 cols=custom_colors) 

  
ggsave("FigS7A_common_L1CAM-EZR_vlnplot.pdf",
       plot = plots,
       width = 7, 
       height =5)
```
